title: To-Do
scope: A focused to-do lens for each user: a default to-do list (backed by the Lists app) plus an optional backlog, with quick add / mark-done and a weekly triage nudge. Owns the user-scoped to-do config (which list is default/backlog, nudge settings); the items themselves live in the Lists app. NOT a general multi-list manager (that is the Lists app).

specs.title: View the to-do list
specs.behavior: Showing the to-do list resolves the user's default list automatically and returns its open items.

specs.title: Add a to-do item
specs.behavior: Adding an item appends it to the user's default to-do list, optionally at the top.

specs.title: Mark a to-do done
specs.behavior: Marking a to-do done matches it by text and archives it off the active list.
